name: IMA Nano Banana
tagline: Text-to-image, image-to-image — Nano Banana series only. Lightweight AI image generation.
description: Image generation with IMA Open API, restricted to Nano Banana model IDs (gemini-3.1-flash-image, gemini-3-pro-image). Supports text-to-image and image-to-image. Requires IMA_API_KEY. For local file upload, users must explicitly pass --allow-secondary-upload-domain because API key is sent to imapi.liveme.com for upload authentication.
credentialNotice: IMA_API_KEY is required at runtime (--api-key or IMA_API_KEY). It is sent to api.imastudio.com for product/task APIs. For image_to_image with local files, it is also sent to imapi.liveme.com to obtain upload tokens before uploading to OSS/CDN URLs returned by that API. Local uploads additionally require --allow-secondary-upload-domain.

localPaths.purpose: Preference cache and operational logs; logs auto-cleaned after 7 days.

requires.credentialNote: IMA_API_KEY is sent to api.imastudio.com and, for local image uploads, to imapi.liveme.com.

persistence.retention: Logs are auto-cleaned after 7 days; preferences remain until user deletes them.

use_cases: Nano Banana series only: text-to-image, image-to-image
key_features: Strict Nano Banana model allowlist in script runtime
Explicit secondary upload-domain acknowledgment for local file uploads
